description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. Tapping into the colour blocking mood of the moment, this murcia bag clocks in three different hues to colour block on its fabric upper. Wear this with boho-ethnic ensembles. Ruched fabric colour block styling on the upper with leatherette base and handles Two handles and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap One main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket and pouch Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
